stdout:
usage: pcl context check [-h] (--job JOB_ID | --task TASK_ID) [--require-bound-receipt]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --job JOB_ID          Agent job id to check
  --task TASK_ID        Task id to check
  --require-bound-receipt
                        Exit with a typed error unless a matching target-bound code-context receipt is present.
